summary: 该代码单元实现了Vue Router的路由配置，定义了多个前端页面路径与视图组件的映射关系，支持用户通过URL导航到不同功能页面。

nodes.name: index
nodes.code_snippet:
import { createRouter, createWebHistory } from "vue-router"

import ChatView from "../views/ChatView.vue"
import RadarView from "../views/RadarView.vue"
import LineView from "../views/LineView.vue"
import AgentView from "@/views/AgentView.vue"
import CodeStoryView from "@/views/CodeStoryView.vue"
import DocumentStoryView from "@/views/DocumentStoryView.vue"
import ProjectStoryView from "@/views/ProjectStoryView.vue"
import UserStoryOptimizationView from "@/views/UserStoryOptimizationView.vue"
import HistoryStoryView from "@/views/HistoryStoryView.vue"

const routes = [
    { path: "/", component: ChatView },
    { path: "/code-story", component: CodeStoryView },
    { path: "/document-story", component: DocumentStoryView },
    { path: "/project-story", component: ProjectStoryView },
    { path: "/story-optimization", component: UserStoryOptimizationView },
    { path: "/analysis/radar", component: RadarView },
    { path: "/analysis/line", component: LineView },
    { path: "/history-stories", component: HistoryStoryView },
    { path: "/agent", component: AgentView },
]

export default createRouter({
    history: createWebHistory(),
    routes
})
nodes.split_strategy: 整体分析：未识别到可拆分的函数/方法/类

requirement.title: 前端路由导航能力
requirement.description: 用户需要能够通过浏览器URL访问不同的功能页面（如首页、代码故事、文档故事、项目故事、故事优化、分析图表、历史故事和代理页面），以实现应用内导航。
business_rules: 每个路径必须对应一个唯一的视图组件
路由使用HTML5 History模式，不支持hash模式

user_story.story: As a 用户, I want 通过不同的URL路径访问对应的功能页面, So that 我可以在单页应用中切换查看不同功能模块。
acceptance_criteria: Given 用户访问根路径'/' When 页面加载 Then 应渲染ChatView组件
Given 用户访问'/code-story' When 页面加载 Then 应渲染CodeStoryView组件
Given 用户访问'/document-story' When 页面加载 Then 应渲染DocumentStoryView组件
Given 用户访问'/project-story' When 页面加载 Then 应渲染ProjectStoryView组件
Given 用户访问'/story-optimization' When 页面加载 Then 应渲染UserStoryOptimizationView组件
Given 用户访问'/analysis/radar' When 页面加载 Then 应渲染RadarView组件
Given 用户访问'/analysis/line' When 页面加载 Then 应渲染LineView组件
Given 用户访问'/history-stories' When 页面加载 Then 应渲染HistoryStoryView组件
Given 用户访问'/agent' When 页面加载 Then 应渲染AgentView组件

items.technical_reasoning: 该需求由代码中的路由配置推导得到：代码使用Vue Router的createRouter和createWebHistory方法，定义了一个包含9个路径的routes数组，每个路径映射到一个从'../views/'或'@/views/'导入的Vue组件。代码导出了创建好的router实例，说明该模块负责提供路由功能。没有调用其他函数，但其他页面视图组件依赖此路由配置。

node.name: index
node.code_snippet:
import { createRouter, createWebHistory } from "vue-router"

import ChatView from "../views/ChatView.vue"
import RadarView from "../views/RadarView.vue"
import LineView from "../views/LineView.vue"
import AgentView from "@/views/AgentView.vue"
import CodeStoryView from "@/views/CodeStoryView.vue"
import DocumentStoryView from "@/views/DocumentStoryView.vue"
import ProjectStoryView from "@/views/ProjectStoryView.vue"
import UserStoryOptimizationView from "@/views/UserStoryOptimizationView.vue"
import HistoryStoryView from "@/views/HistoryStoryView.vue"

const routes = [
    { path: "/", component: ChatView },
    { path: "/code-story", component: CodeStoryView },
    { path: "/document-story", component: DocumentStoryView },
    { path: "/project-story", component: ProjectStoryView },
    { path: "/story-optimization", component: UserStoryOptimizationView },
    { path: "/analysis/radar", component: RadarView },
    { path: "/analysis/line", component: LineView },
    { path: "/history-stories", component: HistoryStoryView },
    { path: "/agent", component: AgentView },
]

export default createRouter({
    history: createWebHistory(),
    routes
})
